# --移动端关键信息区

> 来源：https://c2.yonyoucloud.com/iuap-yonbuilder-designer/ucf-wh/docs-mdf/mdf/index.html#/components-web/03-yidongduanguanjianxinxiqu | 所属：Web组件

# [](#移动端关键信息区)移动端关键信息区

我这里提供的只是结构，里面可以放各种组件，这是我测试的，具体组件怎么展示看组件的配置来进行配置。

移动端是默认显示 如果想编辑态隐藏 可以容器组件的cstyle 配置 hideMode: ['edit'], 如果编辑态和新增态隐藏 可以 hideMode: ['edit','add']

## [](#1-配置步骤)1. 配置步骤

- 

往下滚动还有个布局

- 

如果要监听![](data:image/png;base64,)这个的点击事件可以用icon
的模型监听 beforeclick 事件

复制的方法 cb.utils.copyContent('复制的内容')

- 

![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/yidongduanguanjianxinxiqu_image2.d94e8cf3.png)如果这里的状态用的select的文本展示模式 可以在select组件的cstyle里配置 iptStyle:{color: 'red',background:'颜色'}

- 

这一种风格是重新修改版。在talbelayout的cstyle里配置theme：theme1（我这边把部分样式写了，不用配了），如果配了 可以把boxStyle去掉了，否则会影响

- 

字体的样式可看Input 文本框（如果组件用的是这个，其它组件需要看下是否能配，如 txtStyle: { color: '#999', fontSize: '0.32rem' }，color(颜色)， fontSize(大小)
![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/yidongduanguanjianxinxiqu_image3.266cbe1e.png)![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/yidongduanguanjianxinxiqu_image4.bb9345b4.png)![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/yidongduanguanjianxinxiqu_image5.8e115fc7.png)

## [](#2-示例)2. 示例

![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/yidongduanguanjianxinxiqu_image6.6e7b6279.png)

meta.containers[0] = {

 cStyle: "{\"extendStyle\":{\"height\":\"auto\"},\"boxStyle\":{\"width\":\"auto\",\"margin\":\"0.4rem 0.2rem 0.2rem\",\"border-radius\":\"0.2rem\"},\"theme\":\"theme1\",\"clearDefault\":true}",

 cControlType: 'tableLayout',

 containers: [

 {

 cControlType: 'tableitem',

 "cStyle": "{\"class\":\"tableFlow\"}",

 iCols_tb: '1',

 iRows_tb: '1',

 rowSpan: '2',

 colSpan: '16',

 controls: [

 {

 "cItemName": "code",

 "cCaption": "合同编码",

 "cCaptionResid": "P_YS_HR_HRCOREF_0000058475",

 "cShowCaption": "合同编码",

 "cShowCaptionResid": "P_YS_HR_HRCOREF_0000058475",

 "iMaxLength": 40,

 "cControlType": "input",

 cStyle: "{\"txtStyle\":{\"color\":\"#999\",\"fontSize\":\"0.2rem\"}}", },

 {

 "cItemName": "1656493861192_14",

 "bMustSelect": true,

 "bHidden": false,

 "cControlType": "Icon",

 

 }

 ]

 },

 {

 cControlType: 'tableitem',

 iCols_tb: '1',

 iRows_tb: '2',

 "cStyle": "{\"style\":{\"padding-top\":\"0.15rem\"},\"class\":\"tableFlow\"}",

 rowSpan: '2',

 colSpan: '16',

 controls: [

 {

 "cItemName": "subject",

 "cCaption": "合同名称",

 

 "cControlType": "input",

 

 },

 {

 "cItemName": "subject",

 "cCaption": "合同名称",

 "cCaptionResid": "P_YS_PF_METADATA_0000085655",

 "cShowCaption": "合同名称",

 "cShowCaptionResid": "P_YS_PF_METADATA_0000085655",

 "iMaxLength": 40,

 "iFieldType": 1,

 "bEnum": false,

 "bMustSelect": true,

 "cStyle": "{\"txtStyle\":{\"fontSize\":\"0.2rem\",\"background\":\"#e5f8ff\",\"color\":\"#8bacd1\",\"padding\":\"0 0.1rem\"}}",

 "noTitle": true,

 "cControlType": "input",

 

 }

 ]

 },

 {

 cControlType: 'tableitem',

 iCols_tb: '1',

 iRows_tb: '3',

 rowSpan: '2',

 colSpan: '16',

 controls: [

 {

 "cItemName": "taxMoney",

 "cCaption": "含税金额",

 "cCaptionResid": "P_YS_PF_PRINT_0000058022",

 "cControlType": "inputnumber",

 

 }

 ]

 },

 ]

 }

## [](#3-特殊配置)3. 特殊配置

### [](#31-印章)3.1. 印章

![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/yidongduanguanjianxinxiqu_image7.b1f2c309.png)

这个印章是select组件的 一种展示形式，配置是cstyle里配置 className:ysstatus。颜色变化看代码逻辑是配

enumArray里的 icon:'bg_颜色'如（bg_#000）

![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/yidongduanguanjianxinxiqu_image8.e3e49cc3.png)

cStyle: "{\"extendStyle\":{\"height\":\"auto\"},\"boxStyle\":{\"width\":\"auto\",\"margin\":\"0.4rem 0.2rem 0.2rem\",\"border-radius\":\"0.2rem\"},\"theme\":\"theme1\",\"clearDefault\":true}",

 cControlType: 'tableLayout',

 containers: [

 {

 cControlType: 'tableitem',

 "cStyle": "{\"class\":\"tableFlow\"}",

 iCols_tb: '1',

 iRows_tb: '1',

 rowSpan: '2',

 colSpan: '16',

 controls: [

 {

 "cItemName": "code",

 "cCaption": "合同编码",

 "cCaptionResid": "P_YS_HR_HRCOREF_0000058475",

 "cShowCaption": "合同编码",

 "cShowCaptionResid": "P_YS_HR_HRCOREF_0000058475",

 "iMaxLength": 40,

 "noTitle": true,

 "iFieldType": 1,

 "bEnum": false,

 "bMustSelect": true,

 "bHidden": false,

 "id": "1668921332356612694",

 "bVmExclude": 0,

 "iBillTplGroupId": "1668921332356612144",

 "iBillId": "1668921332356612099",

 "iBillEntityId": 10,

 "iTplId": "1668921332356612108",

 "cSubId": "ycContractManagement",

 "iSystem": 1,

 "cName": "code",

 "cFieldName": "code",

 "authLevel": 3,

 "cDataSourceName": "cpu-contract.contractchangenew.ContractHistryNewVO",

 "enterDirection": 4,

 "bEnableFormat": false,

 "sysId": "1664456224206225434"

 },

 {

 "cItemName": "1656493861192_14",

 "bMustSelect": true,

 "bHidden": false,

 "bExtend": false,

 "bCanModify": true,

 "cStyle": "{\"iconOpt\":{\"type\":\"svg\",\"icon\":\"fuzhi2\",\"size\":\"0.28rem\"，\"fill\":\"#999\"}}",

 "iAlign": 1,

 

 "cSubId": "",

 "iSystem": 1,

 "cName": "1656493861192_14",

 "bEnableFormat": false,

 "key": "key_1656494268217_0",

 "cExtProps": "{\"cSubId\":\"\",\"xResUrl\":\"\",\"virtualField\":true,\"uncopyable\":0,\"key\":\"key_1656494268217_0\"}",

 "xResUrl": "",

 "virtualField": true,

 "uncopyable": 0

 }

 ]

 },

 {

 cControlType: 'tableitem',

 iCols_tb: '1',

 iRows_tb: '3',

 "cStyle": "{\"style\":{\"padding-top\":\"0.15rem\"},\"class\":\"tableFlowasdfasd\"}",

 rowSpan: '1',

 colSpan: '12',

 controls: [

 {

 "cItemName": "subject",

 "cCaption": "合同名称",

 "cCaptionResid": "P_YS_PF_METADATA_0000085655",

 "cShowCaption": "合同名称",

 "cShowCaptionResid": "P_YS_PF_METADATA_0000085655",

 "iMaxLength": 40,

 "iFieldType": 1,

 "bEnum": false,

 "bMustSelect": true,

 "cStyle": "{\"txtStyle\":{\"fontSize\":\"0.28rem\"}}",

 "iOrder": 70,

 "id": "1668921332356612696",

 },

 },

 {

 cControlType: 'tableitem',

 iCols_tb: '1',

 iRows_tb: '4',

 rowSpan: '1',

 colSpan: '12',

 controls: [

 {

 "cItemName": "taxMoney",

 "cCaption": "含税金额",

 "cCaptionResid": "P_YS_PF_PRINT_0000058022",

 "cShowCaption": "价税合计",

 "cShowCaptionResid": "P_YS_PF_GZTTMP_0000073893",

 "iMaxLength": 255,

 "iFieldType": 1,

 "bMustSelect": true,

 "sysId": "1664456224206225659"

 }

 ]

 },

 {

 cControlType: 'tableitem',

 iCols_tb: '13',

 iRows_tb: '3',

 rowSpan: '3',

 colSpan: '4',

 controls: [

 {

 "cItemName": "verifystate",

 "cCaption": "审批状态",

 "cCaptionResid": "P_YS_HR_HRJQ_0000054667",

 "cShowCaption": "",

 "iMaxLength": 255,

 "iFieldType": 1,

 "bEnum": true,

 "cEnumString": "{\n \"0\":\"未提交审批\",\n \"1\":\"审批中1\",\n \"2\":\"审批通过0\",\n \"3\":\"不通过流程终止\",\n \"4\":\"驳回到制单\"\n}",

 "bMustSelect": true,

 "bHidden": false,

 "bSplit": false,

 "bExtend": false,

 

 "bPrintUpCase": false,

 "bSelfDefine": false,

 "cControlType": "select",

 "iOrder": 3,

 "bMain": true,

 "cStyle": "{\"className\":\"ysstatus\"}",

 "id": "1670356736184156167",

 "bVmExclude": 0,

 "iBillTplGroupId": "1682247860061995010",

 "iBillId": "1547949120278233091",

 "iBillEntityId": "1547949120278233092",

 "iTplId": "1664456224206225412",

 "cSubId": "ycContractManagement",

 "iSystem": 1,

 "cName": "verifystate",

 "cFieldName": "verifystate",

 "authLevel": 3,

 "cDataSourceName": "cpu-contract.contractchangenew.ContractHistryNewVO",

 "enterDirection": 4,

 "cEnumType": "cpu_buyoffer_verifystate",

 "enumArray": "[\n {\n \"nameType\":\"text\",\n \"icon\":null,\n \"cDataRule\":null,\n \"value\":\"未提交审批\",\n \"resid\":\"P_DIWORK_YC_CHECK_0000065150\",\n \"key\":\"0\"\n },\n {\n \"nameType\":\"text\",\n \"icon\":null,\n \"cDataRule\":null,\n \"value\":\"审批中\",\n \"resid\":\"P_YS_OA_XTLCZX_0000030417\",\n \"key\":\"1\"\n },\n {\n \"nameType\":\"text\",\n \"icon\":null,\n \"cDataRule\":null,\n \"value\":\"审批通过\",\n \"resid\":\"P_YS_OA_XTLCZX_0000030544\",\n \"key\":\"2\"\n },\n {\n \"nameType\":\"text\",\n \"icon\":null,\n \"cDataRule\":null,\n \"value\":\"不通过流程终止\",\n \"resid\":\"P_YS_MF_ED-UI_0001303300\",\n \"key\":\"3\"\n },\n {\n \"nameType\":\"text\",\n \"icon\":null,\n \"cDataRule\":null,\n \"value\":\"驳回到制单\",\n \"resid\":\"P_YS_MF_ED-UI_0001303303\",\n \"key\":\"4\"\n }\n]",

 "bEnableFormat": false

 }

 ]

 },

 

 ]

}
